title: DA to review coalitions in Garden Route and Karoo
bodyText:
POLITICAL NEWS - The Democratic Alliance will review its coalition partner strategy in the East Region of the Western Cape following the Freedom Front Plus (FF+) collaboration with the ANC to remove the DA mayor, Chris Mcpherson from office in Oudtshoorn today.


> In a statement issued by DA Regional Chairperson Venolea Fortuin, she says that the FF+ has always presented itself as a "reliable coalition partner" for the DA, but made it clear in her statement that this is no longer the case.


The FF+ joined the PA, GOOD and the Oudtshoorn Community Initiative in voting against  Macpherson in a successful motion of no confidence.

Fortuin said the DA will review its relationship with parties in the region that are regarded as unreliable coalition partners.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
